name: Quick Pea Salad
directions: Drain peas and put into a bowl.
Chop onion and add to peas.
Mix with enough mayonnaise to dress salad.
Serve.

similar.name: Easy, Low Carb Green Pea Salad

name: Grandma T's Pea Salad
directions: Refridgerate canned peas several hours before making recipe. This makes them firm so they don't get mashed when you mix the ingredients together.
In a bowl,mix all ingredients together, stir carefully,salt and pepper to taste and refridgerate until ready to serve.

name: Macaroni and Cheese Pea Salad
directions: Cook macaroni & cheese dinner per box directions; cool. (If you're using leftover macaroni, adjust the remaining ingredients accordingly).
Add chopped eggs, celery, onion, green onion to cooled macaroni & cheese.
Stir in mayonnaise and seasonings.
Gently stir in thawed peas and season to taste.
As with all salads, season to taste.

name: Pea Salad
directions: Gently mix all in a bowl and place in fridge for an hour previous to serving if you like it nice and cold, if not serve right away.
Pea salad is wonderfully versatile, experiment with it.

name: Pea Salad With a Twist
directions: Fry bacon and drain on paper towels to cool.
Empty peas in a colander to thaw and drain.
Meanwhile, dice vegetables into small pieces.

Place peas in a bowl, adding sour cream, diced vegetables, bacon, cashews and seasonings.  Small cubes of cheddar cheese can also be added if desired.  Do not add salt until salad has been rechilled, because after flavors meld salt from cashews may be enough.
Chill and serve in a pretty glass bowl.Enjoy!

name: Pea Salad
directions: Thaw baby sweet peas and snow pea pods either in a strainer under cold water, or by letting sit.
Mix low-fat sour cream and lite mayonnaise, set aside.
Mix baby sweet peas, snow pea pods, water chestnuts, and bacon in a separate bowl.
Add sour cream and lite mayonnaise mixture.
Stir.
Refrigerate overnight and enjoy!

name: Veggie Chopped Salad
directions: Mix all of the lettuce, veggies, sesame seeds and cheese (if you are using it).
Whisk together soy sauce, vegetable oil, sesame oil and vinegar.
Drizzle 1/2 over the salad and toss to coat.  Add more dressing to taste.
Finish with cracked black pepper if you like.

similar.name: Easy, Low Carb Green Pea Salad

name: Pea Salad
directions: In a bowl toss together the peas, the scallion, the radish, the tarragon, the oil, the vinegar, and salt and pepper to taste until the salad is combined well.

name: Pea Salad
directions: In a bowl, combine the peas, cheese and onion.
Stir in mayo and mustard.
Cover and refrigerate until serving.

similar.name: Easy, Low Carb Green Pea Salad

name: Wes' Super Awesome Pea Salad
directions: Place cans of peas in fridge to chill for a couple of hours, this will help them to set up and not turn to mush when mixing.
Dice red onion and cucumber about the same size as the peas.
Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.  You may want to taste it to make sure there is a good amount of salt and pepper.
This can be served right away or left to sit for a couple hours.  It tends to get runny if left to sit too long though.

name: Carrot & Pea Salad
directions: Throw all the ingredients into a bowl & mix well! Add salt & pepper if desired.

similar.name: Easy, Low Carb Green Pea Salad

name: Easy, Low Carb Green Pea Salad
directions: Rinse peas under cold water (to quick thaw); drain.
Mix all the ingredients; cover and refrigerate for 2 hours (to blend flavors).
The serving size is about 3/4 cup.
